title: Brand Identity Designer
brief: We are BCL Canada — Backyard Cricket League Canada. The first streetwear-forward, content-first cricket league in Canada built for the South Asian and Caribbean diaspora in the GTA. We need one creative director who can deliver all of the following: 1. Production-ready logo system (AI/EPS files) — crest, monogram, hat badge 2. Home kit + away kit sublimation print files — ready for manufacturer 3. Brand guidelines — 2 pages, colors, type, tone of voice 4. One-page website — Webflow or Squarespace, mobile-first 5. Brand story + Instagram bio + website copy 6. Instagram templates — 5 post + 3 story formats in Canva or Figma The aesthetic reference is Rastah, OVO, Aimé Leon Dore, and IPL. If you don’t know what those are, this is not the right project for you. We have the concept fully developed. We need execution. Timeline is 4 weeks. Files must be organized, named, and production-ready on delivery.
